title: Bauer 39169 Rechargeable Wet & Dry Shaver | Pressure Sensitive Floating Heads | Pop-Up Precision Trimmer | Waterproof Mens Shavers
features: MENS ELECTRIC SHAVERS – This handheld wet and dry electric male shaver is the perfect shaving device for those men who want a precision trim at home or on the move.

PRESSURE SENSITIVE FLOATING HEADS – This electric shaver features pressure sensitive double floating heads that reach every contour of your face and remains in close contact with the skin for a quick shave that's also gentle on the skin.
POP-UP PRECISION TRIMMER – This shaver also features a unique pop-up precision trimming device that allows you to neatly sculpture the outlines of your facial hair and sideburns.

RECHARGEABLE MENS SHAVER – This mens shaver runs on battery power and is fully rechargeable. A full charge of 8 hours will allow for around 35 minutes of full power. Alternatively, there is the option to ‘plug in and play’ ensuring you can still use the shaver when its on charge.

BAUER PROFESSIONAL – Bauer professional is the leading manufacturer of salon quality hair products as well as beauty and personal care products for both men and women. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
description: Product Description Bauer Professional is leading the way in the manufacturing of innovate and high-quality hair and beauty goods for both women and men. From shavers and beard trimmers to hair clippers and styling products, you can get all your male grooming needs at Bauer Professional. This wet and dry rechargeable mens shaver is great for those men who have a busy lifestyle and need to be on the move quickly in the mornings. The shaver features unique pressure sensitive floating heads that react with every contour of your skin and give you a quick, yet thorough shave. The shaver also has a dedicated pop-up precision trimmer that allows you to neatly sculpt your sideburns and the outlines of your beard. This mens shaver is rechargeable and provides 35 minutes of full power after an 8-hour charge. As well as being handheld and cordless the shaver also works when on charge, on the off chance you need to use it when its plugged in. The shaver is dynamic and compact meaning it can be used not only in the bathroom but at the gym or at the office. It’s also handily compact, allowing it to easily fit into a decent sized washbag ensuring that your face will remain smooth when on holiday or when you’re away from your bathroom. Safety Warning For safe use, always ensure the shaver is powered off before handling or cleaning. Do not use near water or while charging. Be cautious when using the shaver to minimize the risk of cuts and skin irritation. Proper cleaning and maintenance are essential to prevent bacterial growth. Always follow the manufacturer's instructions for optimal and safe performance.
